description_long: This is a modern two-story bungalow with a flat, dark roof and a symmetrical facade featuring a prominent balcony and white railings. The front of the house is flanked by two palm trees and a paved driveway with parking spaces. The rear of the property includes a swimming pool, a patio area with an umbrella, and additional landscaping with trees. Large windows and sliding doors are visible on both levels, providing ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The exterior walls are primarily white with black accents, and the property is surrounded by a manicured lawn and paved walkways. A car is parked in the driveway, and the overall layout suggests a luxurious, urban residential setting.
description: A modern, two-story bungalow with a flat roof, white and black exterior, balcony, pool, and landscaped yard. Features include large windows, palm trees, and a paved driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, balcony, two palm trees, driveway, and parked car.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, palm trees, and the car parked near the entrance.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the swimming pool, patio with umbrella, and additional landscaping.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view emphasizing the pool, patio area, and surrounding trees.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with grouped side and rear windows
